name: mineflayer-web-bot
description: Mineflayer Web Bot 1.0.0 release. Mouse/keyboard control, integrated viewer, bundled plugins and automation.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/bot-manager.js && node --check src/foods.js && node --check scripts/check-node.js && node --check scripts/check-runtime-deps.js && node --check scripts/init-config.js && node --check scripts/print-access.js && node --check scripts/print-url.js && node --check scripts/ensure-dist.js
scripts.install:optional: npm install mineflayer-web-inventory@latest mineflayer-pvp@latest mineflayer-auto-eat@latest mineflayer-armor-manager@latest mineflayer-collectblock@latest mineflayer-tool@latest --save --omit=dev --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.setup: node scripts/check-node.js && node scripts/init-config.js && npm install --omit=dev --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund && node scripts/check-runtime-deps.js && npm run build
